title: Rich Crumble Potato Bake
description: A delicious and comforting potato bake topped with a crunchy crumble mixture, perfect for a satisfying meal. Rich in flavor and easy to make.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the sliced potatoes and melted rich.
Transfer the potato mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the crumble, cheese, and parsley.
Sprinkle the crumble mixture evenly over the potatoes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
